forecasts.reasoning: Alassane Ouattara has consistently maintained suspense regarding his candidacy for the October 2025 election. While his party (RHDP) considers him their natural candidate and has been pushing for his investiture, he has yet to officially declare his intentions. Crucially, up-to-date reporting from April 2025 shows that he intends to delay the declaration even further. Jeune Afrique initially reported that the RHDP would hold its investiture congress on May 17-18, 2025. However, on April 17, 2025, it was widely reported that Ouattara had decided to postpone this congress, specifically aiming to keep his candidacy secret "until June" (jusqu'en juin). As of late April 2025, Reuters also confirms no declaration has occurred. Given that Ouattara actively postponed the May congress to purposely delay the announcement until at least June, the probability that he officially declares his candidacy *before June 1, 2025* is exceptionally low.
